subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The breezes of this Day waft upon thee. Be thou aware, and be not of them that are heedless. This is a Day that hath witnessed lamentation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله تمر علیک نسائم الیوم ان اعرف و لاتکن من الغافلین هذا یوم قد ناح
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
